creator: lth@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Sep 10, 2009 at 1:39 PM, Sergey Skvortsov<skv@protey.ru> wrote:
> On 10.09.2009 12:11, Lars Thegler wrote:
>> Hm. This is a development release, which we do not normally put into
>> the ports tree, so I'm a bit reluctant.
>
> Technically, you already have unpublished version (0.24) in ports tree.

Ah, point taken. This was actually published on CPAN on 27 Jun 2009,
but the author has since removed it. I've contacted him to find out
what he has been smoking, and trying to get him to publish a proper
version. Stay tuned.

/Lars
